/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/apkx.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apkx.dir/src/cli.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apkx.dir/src/paths.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apkx.dir/src/registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apkx.dir/src/install.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apkx.dir/src/run.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apkx.dir/src/fetch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apkx.dir/src/elf_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apkx.dir/src/dex_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apkx.dir/src/runtime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apkx.dir/src/vm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apkx.dir/src/bionic_darwin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apkx.dir/src/jni_bridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apkx.dir/src/graphics_metal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apkx.dir/src/system_services.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apkx.dir/src/dex_interpreter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apkx.dir/src/syscall_hook.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apkx.dir/src/dex_executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apkx.dir/src/real_dex_executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apkx.dir/src/app_execution.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apkx.dir/src/graphics_cocoa.mm.o CMakeFiles/apkx.dir/src/android_ui_renderer.mm.o -o apkx  /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd -framework Metal -framework MetalKit -framework Cocoa -framework QuartzCore /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd
